items.title: Pep: City can 'handle' stress of Arsenal title race
items.summary: Pep Guardiola said he's sure Manchester City can handle the pressure of a tight title race after a nervous night against Burnley.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 'Hey Jude:' Jodar shouts out Bellingham after win
items.summary: After clinching a first-round win on debut at the Madrid Open, Spain's newest tennis sensation Rafael Jodar raised his arms and opened them wide to imitate the goal celebration...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Urban Meyer Shares What Makes Ohio State's NFL Draft Stars Special
items.summary: Urban Meyer joined Colin Cowherd to break down why Arvell Reese, Sonny Styles, and Carnell Tate are elite NFL prospects and projected top 10 picks for 2026.
